cards.flavor_text: [i]Murky Otarian tides hide the forgotten treacheries of the Phyrexian war.[/i]
[i]Gnolls make offerings to sinister forces in the shadow-drenched chasms.[/i]
[i]From Otaria, the sun above meets the sea below at a glittering horizon.[/i]
[i]Silence, the poetry of a whispering wind, the centurial fall of tar on pale sand.[/i]
[i]Stability and volatility churn together, creating beauty and danger both.[/i]
[i]Still to the ignorant eye, yet bursting with life. A million actions and reactions, unstoppable as the dawn.[/i]
[i]Life and death mixing together, both ends of the same cycle giving rise to something else.[/i]
[i]Majesty rising above the arid sweep of land, a bulwark horizon against the mundane, a divide cleaving inspiration from stagnation.[/i]
